name: Roto-Gro International Limited
summary: Roto-Gro International Limited, an agricultural company, produces and sells hydroponic rotational garden systems for the cultivation of cannabis and fresh produce in North America, Europe, and Australia. It also provides advanced automated nutrient delivery and water management systems, including fertigation, nutrient lifecycle planning, facility design and setup, and management solutions, as well as iGrow software that offers dynamic real time analysis of each grow room's environment and nutrient management optimization. It has collaboration with Gibio Inc. and Freshero Pty Ltd for perishable foods. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is based in South Melbourne, Australia.
